channel.title: R on KPress R Blog
channel.description: Recent content in R on KPress R Blog

item.title: The Truth is Out There
item.description: R Markdown This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com. You can embed an R code chunk like this: summary(cars) ## speed dist ## Min. : 4.0 Min. : 2.00 ## 1st Qu.:12.0 1st Qu.: 26.00 ## Median :15.0 Median : 36.00 ## Mean :15.4 Mean : 42.98 ## 3rd Qu.

item.title: The Truth is Out There
item.description: I’m a huge X-Files fan. I also love working with text data. I’ve had an idea floating around for a while to do a tidy text analysis on X-Files episode scripts. But…how to get the data? That’s where web scraping comes in. The X-Files has been around long enough that there are tons of fandom sites, and you can easily find transcripts of the original 9 seasons.
